data.message: worst headache of my life with stiff neck and fever

alerts: 🔒 [SR-006] Thunderclap / worst-ever headache must be treated as subarachnoid hemorrhage until proven otherwise.
🔒 [SR-007] Headache + neck stiffness = meningitis until proven otherwise. Delay = death.

data.note:
VISIT NOTE — March 13, 2026
Patient: 42yo female
Chief Complaint: headache

Subjective:
worst headache of my life with stiff neck and fever

Red Flags Detected: SR-006, SR-007

Disposition: ER NOW

data.text:
DISCHARGE INSTRUCTIONS

⚠ EMERGENCY: Go to the nearest Emergency Room or call 911 immediately. Do not delay.

RETURN PRECAUTIONS — Return to care immediately if you develop:
• Chest pain or severe difficulty breathing
• High fever (>39°C / 102°F)
• Confusion, severe headache, or stiff neck
• Severe worsening of any symptom

This assessment is for triage guidance only and does not replace in-person medical evaluation.
